IMPRINT_POWER.title: Imprint
EVASION_POWER.title: Evasion
EVASION_POWER.description: This turn, damage you take is halved.
EVASION_PLUS_POWER.title: Evasion+
EVASION_PLUS_POWER.description: This turn, damage you take is halved and reduced by 1.
RELOAD_LOCK_POWER.title: Reload Lock
RELOAD_LOCK_POWER.description: You cannot play 'Reload' cards while this is active.
SEAL_RITE_POWER.title: Seal Rite
SEAL_RITE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if a Seal bullet is loaded, increase its Seal level by 1.
SEAL_RITE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, if a Seal bullet is loaded, increase its Seal level by 1.
RICOCHET_POWER.title: Ricochet
RICOCHET_POWER.description: When your bullet deals unblocked damage to an enemy, lose 1 [gold]Ricochet[/gold] and bounce half that damage to a random other enemy (max once per bullet). Removed at the start of your turn.
RICOCHET_POWER.smartDescription: When your bullet deals unblocked damage to an enemy, lose 1 [gold]Ricochet[/gold] and bounce half that damage to a random other enemy (max once per bullet). ({Amount} left) Removed at the start of your turn.
RICOCHET_IMPRINT_POWER.title: Manifest: Ricochet
RICOCHET_IMPRINT_POWER.description: When your bullet deals unblocked damage to an enemy, lose 1 [gold]Manifest: Ricochet[/gold] and bounce half that damage to a random other enemy (max once per bullet). Removed at the start of your turn.
RICOCHET_IMPRINT_POWER.smartDescription: When your bullet deals unblocked damage to an enemy, lose 1 [gold]Manifest: Ricochet[/gold] and bounce half that damage to a random other enemy (max once per bullet). ({Amount} left) Removed at the start of your turn.
OVERCLOCK_DRUM_POWER.title: Overclock Drum
OVERCLOCK_DRUM_POWER.description: The first Tracer shot you fire each turn triggers 1 extra trigger pull.
OVERCLOCK_DRUM_POWER.smartDescription: The first Tracer shot you fire each turn triggers 1 extra trigger pull.
TRACER_FIRED_THIS_TURN_POWER.title: Tracer Rhythm
TRACER_FIRED_THIS_TURN_POWER.description: Tracer Rhythm is active this turn. Does not stack. Removed at the start of your next turn.
TRACER_FIRED_THIS_TURN_POWER.smartDescri: Tracer Rhythm is active this turn. Does not stack. Removed at the start of your next turn.
IMPRINT_IGNITION_POWER.title: Imprint Ignition
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION_POWER.title: Imprint Compression
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION_POWER.description: At turn start, if Imprint is high enough, draw 1 card.
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION_POWER.smartDescripti: At turn start, if Imprint is high enough, draw 1 card.
BALLISTIC_COMPILER_POWER.title: Ballistic Compiler
BALLISTIC_COMPILER_POWER.description: On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 and gain Imprint.
BALLISTIC_COMPILER_POWER.smartDescriptio: On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 and gain Imprint.
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE_POWER.title: Overclock Charge
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE_POWER.description: On every 3rd successful shot each turn, gain {Amount} Energy.
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE_POWER.smartDescription: On every 3rd successful shot each turn, gain {Amount} Energy.
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE_POWER.title: Barrage Collapse
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE_POWER.description: This turn, when Ricochet triggers, deal 3 damage to all other enemies. Only the first {Amount} Ricochet triggers apply this.
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE_POWER.smartDescription: This turn, when Ricochet triggers, deal 3 damage to all other enemies. ({Amount} triggers left).
